data.title: Jim Cramer predicts Seagate's success indicates a bright future for Nvidia, Google, and Amazon due to tech sector growth.
data.description: Jim Cramer from CNBC has identified a significant indicator in the technology sector, indicating that Seagate Technology Holdings PLC's recent performance could signal a sustained infrastructure boom that will benefit major companies like Nvidia Corp., Alphabet Inc.'s Google, and Amazon.com Inc. Cramer believes that Seagate's performance could lead to positive outcomes for Google, Nvidia, Broadcom, Microsoft, and Amazon in the long term. This analysis suggests that the demand for mass storage solutions necessary for data centers and AI model training is not just a temporary increase but a long-lasting structural change. Cramer sees Seagate as a crucial layer in the technological "build out" process, indicating potential growth for the mentioned tech giants. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: WisdomTree expands tokenization to Solana, enabling access to real world assets for investors. (Numbers: WT(NYSE), retail & institutional investors, multi-chain strategy)
data.description: Global financial company WisdomTree, Inc. (NYSE: WT) has revealed its latest move by expanding to Solana as a new blockchain option. This expansion will now allow retail and institutional investors to tap into WisdomTree's tokenized funds through platforms like WisdomTree Connect™ and WisdomTree Prime®. The company's integration of Solana into its multi-chain deployment strategy involves extending its full suite of regulated tokenized funds to the blockchain. This move is expected to provide increased accessibility and opportunities for investors on Solana.

data.title: University of Nairobi study shows Studiosity improves critical thinking by 20%, academic rigor by 15%.
data.description: In Nairobi, Kenya on January 28, 2026, Studiosity revealed findings from a recent pilot study conducted by the University of Nairobi's Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences (FASS). This study, conducted independently, showcases the success of AI-driven academic writing assistance. The results of the study emphasize the impact of this support system, indicating its effectiveness in improving student outcomes.

data.title: OKYO Pharma in successful Type C meeting with FDA for Phase 2b/3 clinical design; confirmed primary endpoint, sample size.
data.description: The FDA has approved the Phase 2b/3 clinical trial design, specifying the primary endpoint, sample size, and development approach. Key details include the primary endpoint for the trial, the specified sample size for participants, and the approach to be taken for further development.

data.title: Cryptocurrency traders monitoring as Bitcoin and Ethereum surge amidst anticipation for Fed's 2025 rate verdict - labor concerns may influence decision.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin and Ethereum has increased as traders prepare for the Federal Reserve's initial rate decision of 2025. Speculation is rising whether Fed Chair Jerome Powell's worries about labor issues will lead to potential rate cuts in March or a postponement of easing measures.

data.title: Heartland Dental celebrates growth, innovation, community impact in 2025 with 11.5 million patient visits.
data.description: Heartland Dental, based in Effingham, Illinois, is a leading dental support organization that has achieved significant growth and made a positive impact in the community. Throughout 2025, practices supported by Heartland Dental completed a remarkable 11.5 million patient visits. This milestone underscores the organization's commitment to providing quality dental care and its dedication to serving a large number of patients across the nation.

EU ACTIVELY LOOKING FOR ALTERNATIVE LNG SUPPLIES SAYS JORGENSEN

data.title: GE Vernova raised its 2026 and 2028 outlook due to AI boom, leading to S&P 500 stock fall.
data.description: On Wednesday, GE Vernova announced increased earnings, boosting long-term guidance again due to the AI industry's growth. The company raised its outlook for 2026 and 2028. Following this news, the stock of GE Vernova dropped in the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Mississippi poll shows majority oppose mobile sports betting and iGaming expansion. Casino coalition and Choctaw Indians among those against.
data.description: A significant majority of voters in Mississippi, including the Casino Coalition and Choctaw Indians, have rejected the proposed expansion of gambling as lawmakers in the state consider legislation on the matter. The proposed "Casino in Your Pocket" initiative has faced strong opposition, with a supermajority of voters expressing disapproval. The new statewide polling data indicates widespread rejection of the expansion, emphasizing the concerns raised by various stakeholders. This development comes amidst ongoing debates among Mississippi lawmakers on the expansion of gambling activities beyond current casino establishments. The strong opposition from key groups and the wider public highlights the challenges faced by proponents of the initiative. The rejection of the proposal underscores the complexities involved in altering existing gambling regulations in the state. The news, dated January 28, 2026, reflects the divergent views within Mississippi regarding the potential expansion of gambling, with significant numbers of voters indicating their disapproval of the "Casino in Your Pocket" concept.

data.title: Elysium Therapeutics secures $7.5M to fast-track novel rescue therapy for oral fentanyl overdose.
data.description: In Lyons, Colorado on January 28, 2026, Elysium Therapeutics, a growing biopharmaceutical firm, revealed plans to create medications to combat and reverse overdoses caused by strong synthetic opioids, particularly when taken orally. The company aims to address the rising concerns surrounding opioid overdoses.

data.title: UES, a division of AV, awarded $75 million task order by U.S. Air Force for biotechnology and smart materials R&D.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, UES, a division of AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAV), has secured a significant task order worth $75 million from the United States Air Force. This task order aims to advance defense systems by focusing on next-generation biotechnology and materials science as part of the Functional Responsive Experimentation for Systems and Humans (FRESH) program at Wright Patterson Air Force Base in Dayton, Ohio. The specific task order, known as TO-03 and titled "Biotechnolog," will play a key role in modernizing defense technologies.

data.title: Arcos Dorados (NYSE: ARCO) plans to open new restaurants and spend on capital expenses in 2026 to maximize McDonald's brand in Latin America and Caribbean. Last year, opened 102 modern restaurants.
data.description: In Montevideo, Uruguay, Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) - Latin America's biggest restaurant chain and the world's largest independent McDonald's franchise operator - announced projections for the opening of restaurants and total capital spending for 2026. The company expressed its dedication to maximizing the McDonald's brand's impact in the region. In the previous year, the focus was on launching 102 state-of-the-art restaurants, emphasizing surpassing expectations.

data.title: Global Smile Foundation uses AI to provide postoperative cleft care, benefiting underserved patients worldwide.
data.description: An AI-enhanced application is being used to improve postoperative follow-up care for cleft surgery in remote areas. Global Smile Foundation (GSF) has implemented this technology to extend postoperative cleft care to underserved patients globally. The initiative aims to reach a larger population and enhance access to follow-up services, benefiting numerous patients in need.

data.title: Hecate Energy Group to hold investor webinar on Feb 5, 2026, at 10AM ET. -  Hecate Energy & EGH Acquisition Corp to discuss operations & strategy.
data.description: Chicago-based company Hecate Energy Group LLC, in collaboration with EGH Acquisition Corp., is set to conduct an investor webinar on February 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The webinar aims to introduce Hecate Energy Group LLC, an independent energy infrastructure developer, along with detailing its operations and near-term strategy. EGH Acquisition Corp., listed on NASDAQ under the symbols EGHA, EGHAU, and EGHAR, will be hosting this event.

data.title: Kornit Digital will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 11. Innovative textile production tech company.
data.description: In Rosh-Ha'Ayin, Israel, on January 28, 2026, Kornit Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: KRNT), a leading company in sustainable digital fashion and textile production technologies, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2025, on February 11th before market trading begins.

data.title: BriaCell shows tumors regression in metastasized cancer patients with liver, brain involvement. Study details included.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on both Nasdaq (BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ, BCTXL) and TSX (BCT), has recently shared new images showcasing the successful treatment of metastatic breast cancer in patients with lesions in the eye, brain, liver, and spine. The company's Phase 2 study includes survival data on these patients and others, which has been previously disclosed. This development demonstrates the potential of BriaCell's immunotherapies to revolutionize cancer care.

data.title: Monro, Inc. reports $293.4 million sales in Q3 of fiscal 2026, a 4.0% decrease from Q3 fiscal 2025.
data.description: Monro, Inc., a prominent automotive repair and tire services company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol MNRO, has disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on December 27, 2025. In this period, the company experienced a 4.0% decline in sales, amounting to $293.4 million, compared to $305.8 million in the same quarter of the prior fiscal year that concluded on March 29, 2025. This decrease was mainly attributed to a reduction in...

data.title: WisdomTree now offers its full lineup of tokenized funds on Solana, highlighting its fast transactions in growing its regulated multi-chain selection.
data.description: WisdomTree recently incorporated Solana into its lineup of tokenized funds, highlighting its rapid transaction capabilities. This move is a part of the company's effort to broaden its regulated multi-chain approach and capitalize on Solana's growing popularity within the crypto market. Solana's inclusion reflects WisdomTree's commitment to diversifying its offerings and staying competitive in the rapidly evolving digital asset space.
